nodes.label: 🔴 LAUNCH BLOCKERS (a new user hits these in the first 5 minutes, or data-trust)
B1 ⊕ — Hardcoded fake medical data in Vault "Emergency view"
B2 ⊕ — Empty-state screens look broken (the new user's first impression)
B3 ⊕ — Encryption race can silently write PLAINTEXT sensitive data
B4 — AI + Google failures dead-end with no recovery
🟡 SHOULD-FIX (trust, accessibility, clarity — before or right after launch)
S2 ⊕ — Modals: no Escape, no backdrop-close, no focus management
S3 ⊕ — Tap targets too small: inline `.notebook-link` actions
S4 — Raw Supabase auth errors shown to users
S5 — Demo/founder copy leaks to real users
S7 — Focus ring still uses retired blue theme
The task — build the agreed "family-first + tap-to-add" home
MVP-Next (Stage 2, only after Day-2 retention proven)
P0: Stabilize AI and API Trust
Acceptance Test For The Next Demo
1. Apps must answer three orientation questions immediately
2. Bottom tabs should be navigation, not a miscellaneous action tray
3. Progressive disclosure is mandatory for a life logistics app
5. Cognitive load is the enemy, especially in forms and setup
6. The market is validating household coordination, but most tools are still calendar/list first
7. Parents want calm, shared visibility, and memory offload
Make Capture a Primary Action, Not a Destination
LifeMap V1 — Real, Secure Per-User Persistence
Real-mode save semantics (the one non-obvious bit)
Phase 2: Replace Hardcoded Values By Area
P3 — Low Visual Noise, Calm Surface
P5 — Progressive Disclosure: Show the Now, Hide the Later
P6 — Externalize Memory; the App Holds State

Fix 1 — Press feedback on all tappable controls (`--motion-press`, scale 0.98, 100ms)

Fix 4 — Kill the ambient breathing loop (spec violation)
